author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Witcher 3: Songs of the Past DLC Expansion Announced Ahead of 2027 Release - IGN Daily Fix
In today's Daily Fix:

CD Projekt RED has made it official: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is getting (at least) one more expansion in the form of Songs of the Past. It's scheduled for release in 2027 and is the third major DLC for The Witcher 3, coming about 11 years after the last expansion, Blood and Wine. This should hold fans over while they wait for The Witcher 4, which currently has no release date. In other open-world RPG news, Warhorse Studios teased their upcoming Lord of the Rings game, and reassured fans of their Kingdom Come: Deliverance games that the LOTR RPG will be similar to those. And finally, Valve is not immune to the global economic situation as they have now raised the price of the Steam Deck OLED models. The 1tb and 512gb models will go up around $230-$300 depending on the hard drive space. The original LCD models appear to have been unaffected (for now).

Thinking of coming to IGN Live 2026? Use promo code THEFIX for a free ticket at checkout. Got to https://ign.com/live for more.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Silent Planet - Elegy of a Dying World - Official Gameplay Teaser Trailer
Watch the Gameplay Teaser Trailer for Silent Planet - Elegy of a Dying World, a 2D sci-fi gothic Metroidvania developed by Vertex Zero. Players will fight through a gothic sci-fi world to make sense of the biological organisms made by a long-gone civilization. Master the game's melee-based action combat, discover forbidden secrets, and navigate a sprawling map with much to explore. Silent Planet - Elegy of a Dying World is coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Spider-Noir - Official Behind-the-Scenes Featurette (2026) Nicolas Cage, Lamorne Morris, Li Jun Li
Don't miss the Behind-the-Scenes Featurette for Spider-Noir, an upcoming live-action superhero series distributed by Amazon Prime Video. Get a behind-the-scenes look at the process of bringing the classic noir tale to life in Spider-Noir, streaming now on Amazon Prime Video.

Spider-Noir tells the story of Ben Reilly, a seasoned, down-on-his-luck private investigator in 1930s New York, who is forced to grapple with his past life, following a deeply personal tragedy, as the city’s one and only superhero.

Spider-Noir stars Nicolas Cage, Lamorne Morris, Li Jun Li, Karen Rodriguez, Abraham Popoola, Jack Huston, Brendan Gleeson, and more. Guest stars such as Lukas Haas, Cameron Britton, Cary Christopher, Michael Kostroff, Scott MacArthur, Joe Massingill, Whitney Rice, Amanda Schull, Andrew Caldwell, Amy Aquino, Andrew Robinson, and Kai Caster are also featured in the series.

Spider-Noir is produced by Sony Pictures Television exclusively for MGM+ and Prime Video. Emmy Award®-winning director Harry Bradbeer (Fleabag, Killing Eve) directed, and executive produced the first two episodes. Oren Uziel (The Lost City, 22 Jump Street) and Steve Lightfoot (Marvel’s The Punisher, Shantaram) serve as co-showrunners and executive producers. Uziel and Lightfoot developed the series with the Academy Award®-winning team behind Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse: Phil Lord, Christopher Miller, and Amy Pascal. Lord and Miller executive produce for their shingle Lord Miller along with Aditya Sood and Dan Shear. Amy Pascal also serves as an executive producer via Pascal Pictures. Cage and Pavlina Hatoupis also serve as executive producers.

Spider-Noir is streaming now on Amazon Prime Video.

#SpiderNoir #AmazonPrimeVideo #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
007 First Light - 007 Things I Wish I Knew Before Starting
007 First Light is an amalgamation of a ton of different inspirations, from IO Interactives own Hitman series, mixed in with a bit of Uncharted, a bit of Watch Dogs, some Deus Ex, and even a little of the Batman Arkham series. It all comes together in a way that makes sense, but that doesn't mean there aren't things that we wish we knew going in to best prepare for what we were in store for. To that end, here are 007 things we wish we knew before we started 007 First Light.

00:00:00 - Intro
00:00:28 - Game Structure
00:01:06 - Licence to Kill
00:02:00 - Stealth and Gadgets
00:03:53 - Instinct
00:05:03 - Hints
00:05:36 - Challenges
00:06:50 - Tactical Simulator
00:08:00 - Outro

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Best-Selling Games of 2026 So Far - Game Scoop! Clip
Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream was the best-selling game of April 2026, but what about the entire year so far? We've got that list, plus the most popular hardware of the year -- and a beloved game that reached an important milestone. All this in a bite-sized Game Scoop! clip.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marathon - Official Season 2 Developer Overview
Check out the Season 2 Developer Overview for Marathon, the hit first-person sci-fi extraction shooter developed by Bungie. Players will get the rundown on the new additions with Season 2: Nightfall straight from the development team with the new Night Marsh map, Sentinel Runner shell, weapons, and more. A free weekend is also coming to Marathon from June 2 through June 9. Get a look at gameplay of Night Marsh and Sentinel with the latest Developer Overview for Season 2 of Marathon, available now for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Midnight Moments - Official Announcement Trailer
Here's your look at the Midnight Moments announcement trailer for this upcoming cozy cyberpunk diorama-building game where you build rain-soaked backstreets, glowing apartment blocks, and quiet neighbourhood corners, then zoom in and fill them with handcrafted props and citizens. No goals, no pressure, just vibes. Midnight Moments will be available on PC. You can wishlist Midnight Moments on Steam if you're interested: https://store.steampowered.com/app/4666090/Midnight_Moments/

author: IGN YouTube
text:
007 First Light - Official 4K DLSS 4.5 Gameplay
Don't miss the 4K DLSS 4.5 Gameplay for 007 First Light, the latest third-person action-adventure game based on the beloved 007 IP developed by IO Interactive. Players will experience the younger years of James Bond in stunning fidelity courtesy of NVIDIA technology with DLSS 4.5 Dynamic Multi Frame Generation and Super Resolution support. 007 First Light is available now for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC (Steam).

Source: https://youtube.com/nvidia

author: IGN YouTube
text:
C-Beams - Official Announcement Trailer
Here's your look at the C-Beams announcement trailer for this upcoming sci-fi action RPG. Pilot your ship through a perilous black hole system in C-Beams. Engage in advanced ship combat, haul rare elements, and upgrade your vessel to survive. Stunning visuals, a deep narrative, and a rewarding progression system await as you uncover the abyss's dark secrets. C-Beams will be available on PC (Epic Games Store and Steam).

In 2006, To Catch a Predator host Chris Hansen sets out to make television history. Watch the teaser trailer for Primetime, an upcoming movie starring Robert Pattinson, Merritt Wever, Skyler Gisondo, Matthew Maher and Bokeem Woodbine.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Tides of Annihilation - Official Technical Behind-the-Scenes Overview
Don't miss the Technical Behind-the-Scenes Video for Tides of Annihilation, an upcoming fantasy action-adventure game developed by Eclipse Glow Games. Players can hear from the development team behind the game's deep technical partnership between Unreal Engine and NVIDIA. Said partnership is intended to deliver unmatched visual fidelity and next-gen gaming performance to keep up with the action of Tides of Annihilation. Path tracing, super resolution, detailed facial animations, and more are coming to Tides of Annihilation, launching soon on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).
